title: CAT SKIN ResourcePack
description: Resource pack with cat skin (Jadu cat).
body:
# 🪄 Jadu Cat Resource Pack 🪄

Bring the ultimate chonky energy to your game! This resource pack replaces vanilla elements with **Jadu Cat**—the famous, delightfully bald, and wonderfully fat sphinx cat. If you love unique, humorous, and high-quality textures, this pack is exactly what your Minecraft world needs. 😻

---

## ✨ What Changes?

* **The Ultimate Cat Upgrade** 🐾
  Say goodbye to ordinary felines! Vanilla cats are completely re-skinned into the glorious, hairless, and chunky Jadu Cat.
* **Totem of Immortality... but Chonky** 🗿
  The Totem of Undying is now a mini Jadu Cat! Feel the absolute safety of being protected by a bald sphinx whenever you face danger.
* **Jadu-Themed Main Menu** 🖥️
  Get greeted by a custom, beautiful Jadu Cat-themed background every single time you launch Minecraft.

---

## 📸 Screenshots & Community

* **Check out the Mod version!** If you want a standalone mob with custom AI, mechanics, and unique loot drops, don't forget to check out the official [JADU CAT UPDATE mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/jadu-cat-update).

![Cute Bald Cat](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/18c37ea625e1116b8b62519e09bbf42bbca2338e_0.webp)
